episodes.content:
Dana: Did you see Harborview Robotics just raised a Series B? Their CEO Elena Vasquez was on the funding panel last week.
Leo: Yeah — the Atlas arm demo was slick. They're based in Lisbon, right?
episodes.name: ep-0

episodes.content: Harborview Robotics is a Lisbon-based robotics company founded in 2021 by Elena Vasquez and Rafael Costa. Vasquez serves as chief executive officer, while Costa is the chief technology officer. The company's flagship product, the Atlas arm, is deployed in warehouse automation across Europe.
episodes.name: ep-1

episodes.content: Harborview Robotics announced today that co-founder Rafael Costa is stepping down as chief technology officer to start an independent research lab in Porto. Chief executive Elena Vasquez will oversee the engineering organization during the transition.
episodes.name: ep-3
